name: Athasian Human
description: Humanoid. Medium or Small, chosen when you select this species. Athasian humans are resilient and broadly adaptable. Water Sense: you have advantage on checks to detect small water sources at a distance and to detect rain falling upwind by smell. Resourceful: you gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest. Skillful: gain proficiency in one skill of your choice. Versatile: gain an Origin feat of your choice.
